creator: sanpei@yy.cs.keio.ac.jp
text:
I updated jp-mh(ports/japanese/mh), and put ports files:

	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/jp-mh-96121401.tar.gz

  Changes:
	*support POP protocols*

	patch-aa
		support POP protocols (RPOP)

	patch-ab
		speed-up folder command patch from mew

	patch-ac
		import from mail/mh/patches/patch-ac

	patch-ag
		smail (X-au..) error patch from mew

	patch-ah
		for MPOP,BPOP


  Please submit these changes.

Thank you.
